title: globimetula anguliflora
intro: Globimetula anguliflora, also known as the claw-leaved globimetula, is a flowering plant species in the family Globulariaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Globimetula anguliflora include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing its leaves in water, and it can also be consumed as a decoction or used topically as an ointment.
